hook: Compatibility is not just shared attraction; it is shared friction tolerance, values, and rhythm.
body: Two people can like each other and still make each other work too hard in daily life.

hook: Men often keep chasing a promising spark while ignoring that the actual interaction feels draining or mismatched.
body: Use chemistry as one input, not the whole decision system.

body: A date can feel exciting yet still reveal mismatched pace, humor, or emotional style that matters later.

body: After a strong date, ask not only whether you want more, but whether the dynamic actually fits your life.
